title: Tiramisu PvP Blue
description: TiramisuPVP Blue is a texture pack for PvP players, focused on creating cool and creative PvP textures.
body:
# What is Tiramisu PvP

**TiramisuPVP Blue** is a **texture pack** for PvP players, focused on adding cool and creative  
PvP textures.

This texture pack was originally made for my friends.

# **Features**
- New sword textures  
- New armor textures  
- New item textures  
- New sword model  
- And more!

# Images
